domainCoverage.summary: Core 1:1 social intent routing, hard-filter policy enforcement, and async recovery are covered in the canonical backend corpus.
Passive discovery and reconnect ranking/delivery flows are covered, including blocked/muted/reported suppression and delayed widening behavior.
Group suggestion, active group messaging policy guards, archive lifecycle, and recurring-circle member safety constraints are covered.
Scheduled social reminder workflows are covered across notification + agent-thread modes, including quiet-hours rerouting.
Dating-ready behavior is fully covered with verified-eligibility, consent lifecycle, no-match recovery, and strict safety escalation scenarios.
Commerce support covers listing, offer/counteroffer, escrow transitions, dispute handling, fulfillment, and replay-safe side effects.
Safety routing and moderation outcomes are covered for scam/spam and underage/illegal/coercive signals with deterministic enforcement paths.
Eval scorecards and trace-grade regression scenarios are covered as first-class backend release gates.

scenarios.utterance: Find me someone to play tennis with tonight.
